prompt_en: Cinematic Korean apocalypse opening for CH06 하강 관문. checkpoint pursuit, diesel smoke, official line versus detour line, compressing corridors. Location mood: 하강 관문 검문장, 붕괴 버스 차선, 우회 격리 복도. camera_notes: medium lens, forward pressure, linear escape framing. Start wide, move into corridor pressure, end on route decision beat.
